text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This morning I talked to Taishin about how we
should both try as hard as we can. Can you guess
what she said?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
"If you dare hold back, I'll kick you across
school!" Haha, as if I'd ever hold back!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll give it her all. She really does hate
to lose!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So I better work hard too!
choice_data_list: Right! I'll be right there with you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! All riiight, let's give it everything we've got!
